creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Given the development of CDDB and available services (servers) we're going to remove support in tree. Can you have a look if you can remove libcddc as dependency or if it's time to sunset port? While not directly related we're also looking into sunsetting GTK2 so it would be great if you would look into that too.

Best regards,
Daniel
